productDisplayName: Puma Men Foundation Quarters Black Socks
description: Wear these comfy socks from puma to keep your feet cosy. puma ensures that all their products are designed to offer the best performance.One pair of warm ankle length socks in whiteMade of 70% cotton, 29% nylon and 1% elastaneBig chunky rib at opening to grip above ankle with contrast tipsThree dimensional shaped heel and toe for best FitTerry-towelling inner for extreme comfort and warmthBranding on the cuff and footSock careMachine wash in warm waterDo not iron, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean
